control_awareness: Control P2P-C-001 requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Control P2P-C-002 prevents self-approval by the requester. Control P2P-C-003 requires pre-PO approval before order issuance.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department head approval before any purchase order is issued, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given no unusual pressures and the purchase amount exceeding 1,000,000, a normal purchase request for the full amount with department head approval is the appropriate and auditable action to meet the purchase need while complying with all controls.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds 1,000,000, so department_head approval is required. Creating a single purchase request with the full amount follows the standard process and ensures clear auditability.
